retry_reason: Not applicable — the function is not a get/put wrapper; the skb free is unconditional when a valid msdu exists, and early exit due to null msdu is a no-op case, not a retry scenario.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to free a TX buffer (skb) and clean up associated state (IDR removal, DMA unmapping, and decrementing pending count). The refcount operation (dev_kfree_skb_any) is only one step in a multi-step cleanup process, not the main focus.
